{{Quote|Mardec's story is certainly a tragic one: he was a man who worked hard for his family only to have them taken from him.|[[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Detta Rotan]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Riic Mardec''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] cab driver.

==Biography==
A native of [[Gotida]], Mardec lived in [[Jalor City]] with his wife [[Lina Mardec|Lina]] and two daughters, [[Sale Mardec|Sale]] and [[Fora Mardec|Fora]]. He was a law-abiding citizen who worked as a cab driver for fourteen years. He wanted to save enough money to move to a better place to raise his daughters.<ref name="AIR" />

Unfortunately, in [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], the Mardecs (except for Riic) died in a crossfire when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] attacked a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cell. The "collateral damage" could have happened due to Rebel or Imperial fire, but Mardec began blaming the "revolutionary" Alliance. Afterward, he began frequenting canteens and saying he would get revenge.<ref name="AIR" />

Rebel cell leader [[Detta Rotan]] considered a formal apology to Mardec in the name of the Alliance, no matter who was really guilty. Should Mardec refuse the apology, Rotan suggested helping him as much as possible.<ref name="AIR" />
